narrative:
Precinct Palmyra C (precinct in Portage County) has 718 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a clear Republican lean of 11.1 percentage points.
